title: sapium balansae
intro: Sapium balansae, also known as the Balansa sterculia or Balansa sterculia tree, is a plant species native to Southeast Asia. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its various medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent effects. The health benefits of Sapium balansae include the treatment of fever, diarrhea, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a digestive aid. Herbal preparations of Sapium balansae include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, and capsules for medicinal purposes.
